what: Goal: minimize API calls and context bloat
title: Claude Code working rules (fishr)
text: Prefer ONE request per phase: Design → Implement → Fix failures → Polish. iterate tiny steps. Batch edits run checks per phase.

title: Claude Code working rules (fishr)
text: NEVER read whole files default. First: use rg locate symbols. read smallest necessary window (≈ ±80–150 lines). context needed, ask explicitly section expand.

title: Claude Code working rules (fishr)
text: paste full R CMD check, devtools::check(), benchmark output conversation. ERROR lines WARNING lines immediate stack/trace context (≤ 60 lines total) benchmarks, report summary table / key numbers.

title: Claude Code working rules (fishr)
text: editing, prefer single coherent patch addresses items phase. large edits, provide short “changed” list + exact files touched.

title: Claude Code working rules (fishr)
text: Default: write tests can run offline possible test require login/network, ensure guarded skip_if().

title: Claude Code working rules (fishr)
text: making edits non-trivial refactor, start producing: 1) design sketch 2) cache semantics & invalidation plan 3) performance risks 4) concurrency/locking assumptions 5) test plan wait confirmation implement.

title: Claude Code working rules (fishr)
text: Always ask pushing master Feature branches : new functions, refactors, bug fixes touching multiple files, cache/logic changes, non-trivial code Direct master : typo fixes, small doc tweaks, version bumps, NEWS, release prep committing: pause say “Changes ready review” user can check RStudio Git pane Wait go-ahead committing

title: Claude Code working rules (fishr)
text: internal/non-exported functions, use @noRd roxygen comments

title: Claude Code working rules (fishr)
text: completing subtask, run /compact. unrelated tasks, run /clear.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Gregory Jefferis. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Jefferis G (2026). fishr: Access Fish2 FlyEM Dataset. R package version 0.1.0, https://flyconnectome.github.io/fishr/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {fishr: Access the Fish2 FlyEM Dataset},   author = {Gregory Jefferis},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://flyconnectome.github.io/fishr/}, }

title: Access the Fish2 FlyEM Dataset
text: fishr thin wrapper around malevnc working fish2 larval zebrafish whole-brain EM dataset style malecns yakuba. fish2 dataset currently proofread Janelia Research Campus. initial package focuses : dataset selection helpers (choose_fish, with_fish) neuprint metadata connectivity queries (fish_neuprint_meta, fish_connection_table) body id lookup (fish_ids) DVID body annotations (fish_dvid_annotations) neuroglancer meshes (read_fish_meshes)

title: Access the Fish2 FlyEM Dataset
text: also need make sure authenticated clio neuprint.
code: # install natmanager if needed if (!requireNamespace("natmanager")) install.packages("natmanager") natmanager::install(pkgs = "fishr")

title: Access the Fish2 FlyEM Dataset
text: Access neuprint requires authentication. See https://github.com/natverse/neuprintr#authentication details. recommendation set neuprint_token environment variable, available logging neuprint website. Follow instructions link get token edit .Renviron file. Make sure blank line end file. Note can optionally specify default server dataset .Renviron file ensure R functions neuprintr (see ) also target fish dataset default:
code: # nb this token is a dummy neuprint_token="asBatEsiOIJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJlbWFpbCI6ImIsImxldmVsIjoicmVhZHdyaXRlIiwiaW1hZ2UtdXJsIjoiaHR0cHM7Ly9saDQuZ29vZ2xldXNlcmNvbnRlbnQuY29tLy1QeFVrTFZtbHdmcy9BQUFBQUFBQUFBDD9BQUFBQUFBQUFBQS9BQ0hpM3JleFZMeEI4Nl9FT1asb0dyMnV0QjJBcFJSZlI6MTczMjc1MjU2HH0.jhh1nMDBPl5A1HYKcszXM518NZeAhZG9jKy3hzVOWEU" neuprint_server="https://neuprint-fish2.janelia.org" neuprint_dataset = "fish2"

title: Access the Fish2 FlyEM Dataset
text: need authenticate Clio API interact Clio/DVID annotation system. via Google OAuth “dance” web browser automatically triggered choose_fish(). Note Clio neuprint tokens look similar, . Note also neuprint token appears indefinite Clio token currently lasts 3 weeks.

title: Access the Fish2 FlyEM Dataset
text: example shows basic activities including finding ids type, fetching metadata connectivity information reading plotting retinal ganglion cell meshes.
code: library(fishr) library(nat) choose_fish()  # find some RGCs rgc10=fish_ids("RGC")[1:10] # get metadata fish_neuprint_meta(rgc10)  # connectivity query fish_neuprint_meta(rgc10)  # fetch some RGC meshes rgcm <- read_fish_meshes(rgc10) plot3d(rgcm)

title: Access the Fish2 FlyEM Dataset
text: fishr set core functions lot useful functionality R packages interacting flyem connectome data ecosystem especially malevnc neuprintr. malevnc especially useful interacting annotation segmentation infrastructure (clio/DVID). can use function malevnc package wrapping with_fish(). ever use fish dataset per session means subsequent malevbcqueries targeted fish2 dataset. Similarly can use function base neuprintr package package. fish dataset (last) neuprint connection made session neuprintr functions target dataset.
code: with_fish(malevnc::clio_fields()) choose_fish() malevnc::clio_fields() fc=fish_neuprint() fc neuprintr::neuprint_ROIs(conn = fc)

what: Connectivity query for fish2 neurons — fish_connection_table
title: Connectivity query for fish2 neurons — fish_connection_table
text: Connectivity query fish2 neurons

title: Connectivity query for fish2 neurons — fish_connection_table
code: fish_connection_table(   ids,   partners = c("inputs", "outputs"),   moredetails = FALSE,   summary = FALSE,   threshold = 1L,   roi = NULL,   by.roi = FALSE,   conn = NULL,   ...,   dataset = fish_default_dataset() )

title: Connectivity query for fish2 neurons — fish_connection_table
text: ids set body ids (see fish_ids range ways specify ). partners Either inputs outputs. Redundant prepost, probably clearer. moredetails FALSE (default) use columns returned neuprint_connection_table, TRUE join additional fields fish_neuprint_meta, character vector naming specific extra fields (e.g. c("group")). summary TRUE one query neuron given, summarises connectivity grouped partner. threshold return partners >= integer value. Default 1 returns partners. threshold applied ROI weight roi argument specified, otherwise whole neuron. roi single ROI. Use neuprint_ROIs see available. .roi logical, whether break neurons' connectivity region interest (ROI) conn Optional, neuprint_connection object. Defaults fish_neuprint ensure query targets fish2. ... Additional arguments passed neuprint_connection_table. dataset optional, dataset want query. NULL, default specified R environ file used , failing current connection, used. See neuprint_login details.

title: Connectivity query for fish2 neurons — fish_connection_table
text: data.frame.

title: Connectivity query for fish2 neurons — fish_connection_table
code: # \donttest{ fish_connection_table("RGC", partners = "outputs") #> Warning: Clio dataset lookup failed; falling back to baked-in neuprint settings for `fish2`. Clio-backed functionality may be unavailable in this session. #> Warning: Clio dataset lookup failed; falling back to baked-in neuprint settings for `fish2`. Clio-backed functionality may be unavailable in this session. #> Error in (function (path, body = NULL, server = NULL, conf = NULL, parse.json = TRUE,     include_headers = TRUE, simplifyVector = FALSE, app = NULL,     ...) {    if (is.null(app))         app = paste0("neuprintr/", utils::packageVersion("neuprintr"))    req <- if (is.null(body)) {        httr::GET(url = file.path(server, path, fsep = "/"),             config = conf, httr::user_agent(app), ...)    }    else {        httr::POST(url = file.path(server, path, fsep = "/"),             body = body, config = conf, httr::user_agent(app),             ...)    }    neuprint_error_check(req)    if (parse.json) {        parsed = neuprint_parse_json(req, simplifyVector = simplifyVector)        if (length(parsed) == 2 && isTRUE(names(parsed)[2] ==             "error")) {            stop("neuPrint error: ", parsed$error)        }        if (include_headers) {            fields_to_include = c("url", "headers")            attributes(parsed) = c(attributes(parsed), req[fields_to_include])        }        parsed    }    else req})(path = path, body = body, server = server, conf = conf, parse.json = parse.json,     include_headers = include_headers, simplifyVector = simplifyVector,     app = app): Unauthorized (HTTP 401). Failed to process url: https://neuprint-fish2.janelia.org/api/dbmeta/datasets with neuPrint error: Please provide valid credentials. fish_connection_table("RGC", partners = "outputs", summary = TRUE) #> Warning: Clio dataset lookup failed; falling back to baked-in neuprint settings for `fish2`. Clio-backed functionality may be unavailable in this session. #> Warning: Clio dataset lookup failed; falling back to baked-in neuprint settings for `fish2`. Clio-backed functionality may be unavailable in this session. #> Error in (function (path, body = NULL, server = NULL, conf = NULL, parse.json = TRUE,     include_headers = TRUE, simplifyVector = FALSE, app = NULL,     ...) {    if (is.null(app))         app = paste0("neuprintr/", utils::packageVersion("neuprintr"))    req <- if (is.null(body)) {        httr::GET(url = file.path(server, path, fsep = "/"),             config = conf, httr::user_agent(app), ...)    }    else {        httr::POST(url = file.path(server, path, fsep = "/"),             body = body, config = conf, httr::user_agent(app),             ...)    }    neuprint_error_check(req)    if (parse.json) {        parsed = neuprint_parse_json(req, simplifyVector = simplifyVector)        if (length(parsed) == 2 && isTRUE(names(parsed)[2] ==             "error")) {            stop("neuPrint error: ", parsed$error)        }        if (include_headers) {            fields_to_include = c("url", "headers")            attributes(parsed) = c(attributes(parsed), req[fields_to_include])        }        parsed    }    else req})(path = path, body = body, server = server, conf = conf, parse.json = parse.json,     include_headers = include_headers, simplifyVector = simplifyVector,     app = app): Unauthorized (HTTP 401). Failed to process url: https://neuprint-fish2.janelia.org/api/dbmeta/datasets with neuPrint error: Please provide valid credentials. # }

what: Read DVID body annotations for fish2 body ids — fish_dvid_annotations
title: Read DVID body annotations for fish2 body ids — fish_dvid_annotations
text: thin wrapper around malevnc::manc_dvid_annotations   targeting fish2 dataset.  Supports /field:regex query strings   filter annotations locally (see Details).

title: Read DVID body annotations for fish2 body ids — fish_dvid_annotations
code: fish_dvid_annotations(   ids = NULL,   node = "neutu",   rval = c("data.frame", "list"),   columns_show = NULL,   cache = FALSE )

title: Read DVID body annotations for fish2 body ids — fish_dvid_annotations
text: ids One body ids, NULL (default) fetch annotations, query string (see Details). node DVID node (UUID) query. default value 'neutu' uses active neutu node .e. normally date. rval Whether return fully parsed "data.frame" (default) R "list". columns_show Whether show columns '_user' '_time' suffix. Accepted values: 'user', 'time', ''. cache Whether cache result 5 minutes (default FALSE).

title: Read DVID body annotations for fish2 body ids — fish_dvid_annotations
text: tibble body annotations. See   malevnc::manc_dvid_annotations column details.

title: Read DVID body annotations for fish2 body ids — fish_dvid_annotations
text: Query string formats filtering DVID annotations: "/type:RGC..*" Match type field regex     RGC..*. "RGC.*" Equivalent shorthand — bare strings default     type field. "/status:Traced" Match different field. Regex queries automatically anchored (^...$) unless pattern already starts ^.  Queries fetch annotations (cache=TRUE) filter locally. neuprint-based id lookups, use fish_ids instead.

title: Read DVID body annotations for fish2 body ids — fish_dvid_annotations

Please check `options('malevnc.server')")        else stop("Cannot reach malevnc server or google. what: Resolve fish2 body ids from a variety of inputs — fish_ids
title: Resolve fish2 body ids from a variety of inputs — fish_ids
text: Extracts body ids vectors, data.frames, query strings.   Query strings passed malevnc::manc_ids via   fish2 neuprint server.  filtering DVID annotations field, see   fish_dvid_annotations.

title: Resolve fish2 body ids from a variety of inputs — fish_ids
code: fish_ids(   x,   mustWork = TRUE,   as_character = TRUE,   integer64 = FALSE,   unique = TRUE,   conn = NULL )

title: Resolve fish2 body ids from a variety of inputs — fish_ids
text: x numeric/character vector body ids, data.frame bodyid column, neuprint query string (e.g. "DNa02", ":status='Traced'"). mustWork TRUE (default) error raised ids found. as_character Whether return ids character (default TRUE). Character safest default body ids may exceed 53-bit integer limit double-precision floating point (2^53 - 1). integer64 Whether return ids bit64::integer64 (default FALSE). Takes precedence as_character. unique Whether de-duplicate result (default TRUE). conn neuprint_connection object (default NULL uses fish_neuprint).

title: Resolve fish2 body ids from a variety of inputs — fish_ids
text: character vector body ids (default),   bit64::integer64 integer64=TRUE   as_character=FALSE.

title: Resolve fish2 body ids from a variety of inputs — fish_ids
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # neuprint query by type fish_ids("DNa02") # neuprint where clause fish_ids("where:status='Traced'") # numeric ids passed through fish_ids(c(12345, 67890)) # from a data.frame df <- fish_dvid_annotations() fish_ids(df) } # }

title: Login to fish2 neuprint server — fish_neuprint
text: token neuprint authorisation token obtained e.g. neuprint.janelia.org website. dataset Allows override neuprint dataset fish_neuprint (otherwise chosen based value options(fishr.dataset), normally changed choose_fish_dataset). Force Passed neuprintr::neuprint_login. ... Additional arguments passed neuprint_login.

title: Login to fish2 neuprint server — fish_neuprint
text: neuprint_connection object returned   neuprint_login.

title: Login to fish2 neuprint server — fish_neuprint
text: possible use token across public   private neuprint servers using email address. However   seem work users. giving , try   using recently issued token private server rather   older tokens. need pass specific token can use   token argument, also setting Force=TRUE ensure   specified token used already tried log   current session.

text: ids Body ids, query string (see fish_ids), NULL return bodies known neuprint. conn Optional, neuprint_connection object. Defaults fish_neuprint ensure query targets fish2. roiInfo Whether include ROI information (default FALSE). simplify.xyz Whether simplify columns containing XYZ locations simple "x,y,z" format (default TRUE). ... Additional arguments passed neuprint_get_meta. dataset name dataset reported Clio (default "fish2").

title: Fetch neuprint metadata for fish2 neurons — fish_neuprint_meta
text: data.frame one row unique input id NAs   columns except bodyid neuprint holds metadata.

what: Interactive setup helper for fish2 authentication — fish_setup
title: Interactive setup helper for fish2 authentication — fish_setup
text: fish_setup() checks whether current R session set   fish2 neuprint server can write recommended   neuprint_* variables user's .Renviron file.

title: Interactive setup helper for fish2 authentication — fish_setup
code: fish_setup(set_session = interactive())

title: Interactive setup helper for fish2 authentication — fish_setup
text: set_session Whether apply saved values current R session via Sys.setenv (default TRUE).

title: Interactive setup helper for fish2 authentication — fish_setup
text: Invisibly returns list describing detected configuration   values written .Renviron.

title: Interactive setup helper for fish2 authentication — fish_setup
text: setup helper uses lowercase neuprint_* environment   variables default still common convention   across natverse. also detect uppercase variants report   user. choose save settings, fish_setup() writes directly   user .Renviron file , default, also sets variables   current session things work immediately.

title: Interactive setup helper for fish2 authentication — fish_setup
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ fish_setup() } # }

what: fishr: Access the Fish2 FlyEM Dataset — fishr-package
title: fishr: Access the Fish2 FlyEM Dataset — fishr-package
text: thin wrapper around malevnc package providing access fish2 larval zebrafish EM dataset proofread Janelia Research Campus part collaboration Engert / Lichtman labs Harvard Google Research. Currently provides convenience functions reading meshes setting dataset options.

title: fishr: Access the Fish2 FlyEM Dataset — fishr-package
text: fishr.dataset name active fish2 dataset (default   "fish2"). Set choose_fish_dataset. following malevnc.* options set choose_fish   with_fish point malevnc package fish2   servers:  malevnc.server DVID server URL (set via Clio lookup). malevnc.rootnode DVID root node UUID (set via Clio lookup). malevnc.neuprint neuprint server URL (fallback:   https://neuprint-fish2.janelia.org). malevnc.neuprint_dataset neuprint dataset name (fallback:   "fish2").

title: fishr: Access the Fish2 FlyEM Dataset — fishr-package
text: Maintainer: Gregory Jefferis jefferis@gmail.com (ORCID)

title: fishr: Access the Fish2 FlyEM Dataset — fishr-package
code: # \donttest{ options()[grepl("^fishr", names(options()))] #> $fishr.dataset #> [1] "fish2" #>  # } if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ with_fish(read_fish_meshes(12345)) } # }

what: Read meshes for fish2 body ids — read_fish_meshes
title: Read meshes for fish2 body ids — read_fish_meshes
text: Fetches pre-computed neuroglancer meshes fish2 DVID   server. Meshes returned nm coordinates default (8 nm voxels).

title: Read meshes for fish2 body ids — read_fish_meshes
code: read_fish_meshes(ids, node = "neutu", units = c("nm", "raw", "microns"), ...)

title: Read meshes for fish2 body ids — read_fish_meshes
text: ids One body ids (numeric character), query string accepted fish_ids. node DVID node (UUID) query. default value 'neutu' uses active neutu node .e. normally date. units One "nm" (default), "raw" (8 nm voxels), "microns". ... Additional arguments passed httr::GET.

title: Read meshes for fish2 body ids — read_fish_meshes
text: neuronlist containing one   mesh3d   objects.

title: Read meshes for fish2 body ids — read_fish_meshes
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # pick 10 RGC meshes to read in rgcs <- read_fish_meshes(fish_ids('RGC')[1:10]) plot3d(rgcs) } # }

what: Evaluate an expression after temporarily setting malevnc options — with_fish
title: Evaluate an expression after temporarily setting malevnc options — with_fish
text: with_fish temporarily changes server/dataset options   malevnc package target fish2 dataset   running expression. choose_fish_dataset sets default dataset used   fish_* functions. recommended way access fish2 dataset   variants. Unlike choose_fish permanently change   default dataset used callers use functions malevnc   package directly. choose_fish swaps default malevnc   dataset fish2 dataset. means functions   malevnc package target fish2 instead. recommended   use with_fish temporarily unless   intention using FlyEM datasets. switch default fishr   dataset please see choose_fish_dataset. Clio dataset lookup unavailable, choose_fish falls back   built-neuprint-configuration main fish2 dataset.   Clio-backed functionality may unavailable   session.

title: Evaluate an expression after temporarily setting malevnc options — with_fish
code: with_fish(expr, dataset = fish_default_dataset())  choose_fish_dataset(dataset = "fish2")  choose_fish(dataset = fish_default_dataset(), set = TRUE)

title: Evaluate an expression after temporarily setting malevnc options — with_fish
text: expr expression involving malevnc/fishr functions evaluate specified dataset. dataset name dataset reported Clio (default "fish2"). set Whether set relevant package options just return list required options.

title: Evaluate an expression after temporarily setting malevnc options — with_fish
text: with_fish returns result expr.   choose_fish choose_fish_dataset return named list   previous option values, matching options.

title: Evaluate an expression after temporarily setting malevnc options — with_fish
text: choose_fish first tries live Clio lookup via   malevnc::choose_flyem_dataset. fails (e.g. network /   Clio token), falls back baked-neuprint settings. Clio-backed   functions unavailable fallback session.

title: Evaluate an expression after temporarily setting malevnc options — with_fish
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # temporarily target fish2 for one call with_fish(read_fish_meshes(12345))  # or set fish2 as the active dataset for the rest of the session choose_fish() read_fish_meshes(12345) } # }
